name: Fabia Sheen
description:
(Aged up to...No worries, she have always been old enough under the mask.

Allright mates, who else have been watching the Bakugan series?)

The Princess of Neathia and a fierce Haos brawler. She is currently on Earth seeking allies to help defend her home planet from the Gundalian invaders. She is elegant but tough, carrying the weight of her people's survival on her shoulders. She partners with the Haos Bakugan, Aranaut.

Will you help her with your Bakugan perhaps or in other way?
creator: Adik657
